scripts.start: concurrently -n CLEAN,NORM,TOKEN,PERSIST,TXT,PDF,GATE,UPLOAD -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white,gray "node filters/cleaning-filter/server.js" "node filters/normalization-filter/server.js" "node filters/tokenization-filter/server.js" "node filters/persistence-filter/server.js" "node filters/search-txt-filter/server.js" "node filters/search-pdf-filter/server.js" "node gateway/server.js" "node gateway/server-upload.js"
